case_title: ANNETTE MARIE BURRUS VS. LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BURRUS, ANNETTE MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE MARIE BURRUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICERS OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VICTORIA MATTHEWS, EXCUTIVE OFFICE MANAGER. DEFENDANT BROUGHT THREE WITNESSES REPRESENTING DIFFERENT AGENCIES WITHIN THE PLAINTIFF'S PROGRAMS, WHICH THE PLAINTIFF SITED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL THE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURRUS, ANNETTE MARIE
DECLARATION RE: EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURRUS, ANNETTE MARIE
"ANSWER" TO SC-108 (REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA
ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURRUS, ANNETTE MARIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE WRONGFUL CONDUCT BY DEFENDANT OR ITS EMPLOYEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-04-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURRUS, ANNETTE MARIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BURRUS, ANNETTE MARIE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
